app.name: Salone Explorer
app.tagline: Discover Sierra Leone, one attraction at a time.
brand.name: FambulTik
brand.org.description: TpGroup (SL) Limited is the publisher of Salone Explorer, operating the heritage-and-diaspora brand FambulTik.
brand.site.description: A FambulTik guide to the tourist attractions of Sierra Leone, published by TpGroup (SL) Limited for demonstration and educational purposes.
brand.destination.name: Sierra Leone
home.hero.title: Discover Sierra Leone
home.hero.subtitle: A FambulTik guide to the beaches, rainforests, wildlife, and heritage sites of Salone - curated for travellers coming home and discovering it for the first time.
home.attractions.heading: Attractions to explore
home.attractions.intro: A curated set of places to start your journey, drawn from Sierra Leone's coast, forests, and mountains.
home.attractions.empty: No attractions are available right now. Please check back soon.

about.title: About Salone Explorer
about.brand.heading: FambulTik and TpGroup
about.brand: Salone Explorer is published by TpGroup (SL) Limited under the FambulTik brand. FambulTik - Krio for "family stick" - is TpGroup's heritage-and-diaspora brand, helping people reconnect with Sierra Leone through homecoming, genealogy, and cultural education. This guide extends that mission by surfacing the places a traveller might want to see.
about.disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
about.sources.heading: Data sources
about.sources.intro: Attraction information is paraphrased from these authoritative public sources.
about.credits.heading: Credits
about.credits.designSystem: Built on the TpGroup Design System.
footer.disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
footer.help.heading: Help
footer.nav.heading: Explore
disclaimer.short: Demo only - not an official tourism service. Confirm details before travelling.
disclaimer.full: Salone Explorer is built by TpGroup (SL) Limited under the FambulTik brand for demonstration and educational purposes only. It is not an official tourism service and does not represent any government body. Attraction details, opening hours, and ratings are curated from public sources and may be inaccurate or out of date. Always verify directly with the operator before travelling. No payments or real bookings are processed by this application.
